Sonic the Hedgehog 2 (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $190,872,904Details
International Box Office $212,951,693
Worldwide Box Office $403,824,597
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,487,792
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,481,080
Total $11,968,872
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Once settled in Green Hills, Sonic is determined to prove that he has the temperament of a hero. He is put to the test as Dr. Robotnik reappears, this time with a new partner, Knuckles, looking for an emerald that would have the power to destroy entire civilizations. And here’s Sonic alongside his own sidekick, Tails, who venture on a globetrotter mission to find the emerald before it falls into the wrong hands.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$72,105,176 (37.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.65 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,234 opening theaters/4,258 max. theaters, 7.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $216,793,921

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 8th, 2022 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 30th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
March 31st, 2022 (Wide), released as Ježko Sonic 2 (Slovakia)
March 31st, 2022 (Wide), released as Sonic: Super jež 2 (Croatia)
March 31st, 2022 (Wide), released as Ježek Sonic 2 (Czech Republic)
March 31st, 2022 (Wide), released as Sonic 2: O Filme (Portugal)
Video Release: May 24th, 2022 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for action, some violence, rude humor, and mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2723 (cert#53585), 3/16/2022)
Running Time: 122 minutes
Franchise: Sonic The Hedgehog
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (country): Canada, United States
Plot point: Talking Animals, Undercover, Underwater, Wedding Day Disasters
Subgenre: Family Adventure

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Marza Animation Planet, Sega Sammy Group, Original Film, Blur Studio
Production Countries: United States, Japan
Languages: English

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

Once settled in Green Hills, Sonic is determined to prove that he has the temperament of a hero. He is put to the test as Dr. Robotnik reappears, this time with a new partner, Knuckles, looking for an emerald that would have the power to destroy entire civilizations. And here’s Sonic alongside his own sidekick, Tails, who venture on a globetrotter mission to find the emerald before it falls into the wrong hands.

Opening Weekend:$72,105,176 (37.8% of total gross)
